description: shift_letter slides a letter by n and wraps with % 26 so z+1 becomes a (using ord/chr and the -97 / +97 offset)
Spaces and other characters are returned unchanged, so 'attack at dawn' keeps its spaces
caesar_encrypt shifts every letter forward; caesar_decrypt shifts back by -n so decrypt(encrypt(msg, n), n) returns the original message
Reuses shift_letter inside encrypt/decrypt, clear names, a return on every function
